title: Several UFOs near Brasília-DF detected by radar [1991]
excerpt: APRIL 18th, 1991. Time: 05:50. Duration: 25 minutes. A miltary in service at the COPM1 [Military Operations Center] of CINDACTA [Integrated Center for Air Defense and Air Traffic Control] reported the detection of several unidentified flying objects that interfered with the route of a passenger plane. text_preview: APRIL 18th, 1991. Time: 05:50. Duration: 25 minutes. A miltary in service at the COPM1 [Military Operations Center] of CINDACTA [Integrated Center for Air Defense and Air Traffic Control] reported the detection of several unidentified flying objects that interfered with the route of a passenger plane. According to the information from the reporting witness, the UFO was “visualized in 2 displacements on the APP-BR TA 10M radar, starting from NE (RD 050) + 45NM towards BR until 5NM and afterwards, moving away to the South until it disappeared”. ” The position of the unknown objects was “AZ 050 /
summary: CINDACTA military radar tracked multiple UFOs near Brasília at ~0.9 Mach; one caused radio interference to VARIG 291 as it passed within 10NM of the airliner.
